name: I Only Magic Bullet
short_description: I Only Magic Bullet is a game that fires a huge number of bullets to attack a steady stream of enemies. Spread bullet all over the game world. There is not a single enemy debris to be seen in the sea of bullets.
detailed_description:
This is a game that fires a huge number of bullets to attack a steady stream of enemies.

In the game, it is the enemy, not oneself, that needs to be devastated by the barrage.

Upgrade your wand, upgrade your in-game entries, and fire more bullets.

until you spread bullet all over the game world.

There is not a single enemy debris to be seen in the sea of bullet.

Enemies will drop Spirits when they die, which will be a major resource for upgrading wand and entry.

SS, a special resource generated by World Upgrade, is used to upgrade special in-game entries and greatly enhance bullet.

Game entries, get more wands, and the wand fires more and stronger bullets, so that the bullets attach elements and perform elemental reactions.

Get powerful blessings from talent.

The appearance of bullet and wand can be changed at will.

The behavior of arbitrarily controlled bullet and wand.
